integration_points.trading_engine_init: Added mode_controller and mode_recorder instances; initialized _current_r008_mode via _map_to_r008_mode()
integration_points.mode_mapping: PAPER_TRADE=true -> SIM; PAPER_TRADE=false+AUTO_TRADE=false -> OBSERVE; PAPER_TRADE=false+AUTO_TRADE=true -> LIVE
integration_points.trade_gate_validation: run_loop() checks _validate_mode_allows_trading() before trade execution; blocks if mode doesn't allow trading
integration_points.toggle_mode_recording: toggle_mode endpoint records transition in ModeRecorder
integration_points.degradation_pause_recording: DegradationCenter PAUSE_TRADING triggers Mode.PAUSE recording; restore triggers return-to-previous-mode recording

api_endpoints.POST /api/mode_transition: New endpoint; validates transition via ModeController; records via ModeRecorder; maps back to PAPER_TRADE/AUTO_TRADE
api_endpoints.GET /api/mode_history: New endpoint; returns transition history and current mode

authority_ruling.conflict_resolution: ModeController warning logged but existing state prevails to avoid breaking runtime

api_contract_details: Existing /api/toggle_mode and /api/mode contracts preserved exactly. New endpoints added without affecting existing clients.
